en: Are you okay? I'm good. Ellen, I'm sorry. Wait. Go to commercial. Hi. Great to see you.
ko: 괜찮아요? 괜찮아요. 엘렌, 미안해요. 잠깐. 광고 가요. 안녕하세요. 만나서 반가워요.

en: We love you. Oh, God. Oh, God. Pedaling. Pedaling.
ko: 사랑해요. 세상에. 세상에. 페달 밟아. 페달 밟아.

en: Stop honking. Oh, you're going to honk me? You're going to honk? I'm going to bell. How about that? What kind of swimsuit we got working with today?
ko: 경적 그만 울려. 나한테 경적 울릴 거야? 경적 울릴 거야? 나는 벨을 울릴 거야. 어때? 오늘 수영복은 뭐예요?

en: This is what they gave me.
Wow, that's... No, but it's... Oh, my God. Oh, my God. Oh, my God. Oh, my God. Oh, my God.
ko: 와, 그건... 아니, 하지만... 세상에. 세상에. 세상에. 세상에. 세상에.

en: No, but it's more comfortable, and it also cuts down on the drag when you're out there.
ko: 아니, 하지만 더 편하고, 수영할 때 저항도 줄여줘요.

en: That cuts down on the drag. Yeah.
I have a little shrinkage, and I'm not even in the water.
So, have you ever had a flu shot before?
I have never had a flu shot.
Okay, well, I have to give you this.
Just relax. Okay. Okay. It's not a real needle.
ko: 편히 계세요. 네. 네. 진짜 바늘이 아니에요.

en: No. Oh. Not a real needle.
Hold still. Yes. Okay. Yeah. Take your hand and push.
